---
title: "Dmitrii Tereshchenko / Дмитрий Терещенко"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: "sources/haka_ava_2024b.jpg"
  links:

    # Primary email contact
    - icon: envelope-at-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:dtereshch@gmail.com

    # Mastodon social profile
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://econtwitter.net/@dtereshch

    # ResearchGate profile
    - icon: people-fill
      text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Dmitrii-Tereshchenko

    # Source code and projects on GitHub
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/dtereshch

    # R package repository
    - icon: box-fill
      text: R package
      href: https://cran.r-project.org/package=paneldesc

    # Google Scholar profile
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.ru/citations?user=V_XLJ0kAAAAJ&hl=en

    # ORCID identifier
    - icon: person-vcard
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8973-542X

    # ResearcherID (Web of Science)
    - icon: quote
      text: ResearcherID
      href: https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/rid/T-6115-2018

    # Scopus AuthorID
    - icon: quote
      text: Scopus AuthorID
      href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?partnerID=HzOxMe3b&authorId=58020283800&origin=inward

    # SPIN РИНЦ (Russian Science Citation Index)
    - icon: quote
      text: SPIN РИНЦ
      href: https://elibrary.ru/author_profile.asp?authorid=640419
---

::: {#hero-heading}
Academic economist with interest in empirical research. Senior lecturer at HSE University in St. Petersburg. Teaching Econometrics and Empirical IO. R and Python enthusiast.
:::
